overall.description: A slow third-person walkthrough of a large gothic great hall from a video game, featuring vaulted stone ceilings, wooden dining tables, and robed characters seated at benches. The camera follows a character with white hair through the dimly lit interior space with chandeliers and framed portraits on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with dining tables and benches

agents.ego_description: slowly walking through the great hall behind a white-haired character in dark robes, observing the seated students and architectural details

student sitting at a table in the middle of the hall

entered.detail: high arched stone ceiling with ribbed vaulting and dark wooden beams
ornate hanging chandeliers with multiple candles suspended from the ceiling
long dark wooden tables arranged in rows throughout the hall
dark stone walls with vertical architectural details and high windows
rectangular framed paintings hanging on the stone walls
elaborate white stone model or monument with domed top and intricate carvings

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a character slowly walking through a vast gothic great hall with high vaulted ceilings and dim artificial lighting from iron chandeliers. Long wooden dining tables and benches fill the space, with a few robed students seated and conversing. An ornate white architectural model stands prominently on the right, while framed portraits hang on the stone walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast, dimly lit gothic great hall that emphasizes the scale of the vaulted architecture. It begins by trailing a character walking slowly through the space, where iron chandeliers cast a soft glow over long wooden dining tables and benches. As the camera advances, the view passes robed students engaged in quiet conversation, shifting focus toward the detailed textures of the stone walls and framed portraits. The scene then opens up to reveal an ornate white architectural model standing prominently on the right before the camera continues its steady progression deeper into the hall.
